userMessage: what is the comamnd for fastframe

response.text:
## 📋 6 acquisition Commands Found

## **1. SEARCH:SEARCH**

**Description:** This command specifies the status word terminal flag bit value (bit 19) to use when searching on the...

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:MIL1553B:STATUS:BIT:TF {0|1|X|ZERo|ONE|NOCARE|OFF|ON}` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:BUS:MIL1553B:STATUS:BIT:TF?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** Search and Mark

---

## **2. TRIGger:A:BUS:MIL1553B:STATUS:BIT:TF**

**Description:** This command specifies the status word terminal flag bit value (bit 19) to use when triggering on th...

**Set:** `TRIGger:A:BUS:MIL1553B:STATUS:BIT:TF {0|1|X|ZERo|ONE|NOCARE|DONTCare|OFF|ON}` | **Query:** `TRIGger:A:BUS:MIL1553B:STATUS:BIT:TF?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** Trigger

---

## **3. EMail:HOSTwanted**

**Description:** 1 These factory defaults are not reset to factory defaults by Default Setup. Table C-9: Error detect...

**Set:** `EMail:HOSTwanted` | **Query:** `EMail:HOSTwanted?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** E-mail

---

## **4. TRIGger:B:RESET:TRANsition**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the type of transition required for a Transition trigger reset.

**Set:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:TRANsition {RISe|FALL}` | **Query:** `TRIGger:B:RESET:TRANsition?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** Trigger

---

## **5. SEARCH:SEARCH**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the transition time setting for a transition trigger search to determin...

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TRANsition:DELTATime <NR3>` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TRANsition:DELTATime?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** Search and Mark

---

## **6. SEARCH:SEARCH**

**Description:** This command sets or queries the polarity setting for a transition trigger search to determine where...

**Set:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TRANsition:POLarity:CH<x> {EITher|NEGAtive|POSITIVe}` | **Query:** `SEARCH:SEARCH<x>:TRIGger:A:TRANsition:POLarity:CH<x>?`

**Type:** both | **Families:** MSO5000, DPO5000, DPO7000, DPO70000 | **Group:** Search and Mark
